name: faq-grid
title: Faq Grid
description: A static two-column grid of question/answer cards, installed as a wired Payload block.

preview.summary: Static two-column grid of question/answer cards.

sampleContent.title: Common questions
sampleContent.description: Everything you need to know about the platform, at a glance.

items.question: How do I create an account?
items.answer: Click Sign up and follow the prompts. You can register with email or connect your Google account.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: Yes — a 14-day free trial with full access to all features, no credit card required.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: All major credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers for annual plans.

items.question: Can I get a refund?
items.answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee — contact support within 30 days for a refund.
